name: gvm
description: Global programming language version manager. Install, manage, and switch versions of multiple languages from a single CLI.

install_steps: Download the appropriate binary from GitHub Releases (https://github.com/toodofun/gvm/releases)
Place it in your PATH and make it executable

adapterConfig.missingDependencyHelp: Install gvm: download from https://github.com/toodofun/gvm/releases or build from source
